spec_brief: System Settings — D39 User Preferences (23 fields/6 groups, JSONB settings column migration, GET/PATCH /api/v1/users/preferences, D39 page with collapsible-container template), D40 System Management (7 sections including market data, background tasks, feature_flags table), D41 User Management (role/status management, pagination from D39 rows_per_page). Single WP001. LOD200 approved 2026-03-04. LOD400 to be written at GATE_1.

# TEAM_170_S003_P003_WP001_LLD400_v1.0.0 — System Settings (D39+D40+D41)

---

## §2 Endpoint Contract

### 2.1 D39 — User Preferences

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/me/preferences` | Bearer JWT | Return all 23 preference fields for current user |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/me/preferences` | Bearer JWT | Partial update; merge into `settings` JSONB + direct columns |

**GET /api/v1/me/preferences — Response 200**

```json
{
  "language": "en",
  "timezone": "UTC",
  "primary_currency": "USD",
  "date_format": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "default_trading_account": null,
  "default_order_type": "LIMIT",
  "default_time_in_force": "DAY",
  "default_commission_unit": "%",
  "pl_method": "FIFO",
  "default_price_type": "CLOSE",
  "email_notifications_enabled": false,
  "alert_trigger_email": true,
  "weekly_summary_email": false,
  "price_alert_threshold_pct": 5.0,
  "default_status_filter": "active",
  "rows_per_page": 25,
  "default_sort_column": "updated_at",
  "api_rate_limit": 1000,
  "api_key_count": 0,
  "high_contrast_mode": false,
  "font_size": "medium",
  "rtl_mode": false,
  "decimal_separator": "."
}
```

**PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences — Request Body**

Any subset of the 23 fields. Keys map as follows:
- `timezone`, `language` → direct column update on `user_data.users`
- All others → JSONB merge into `settings`

```json
{
  "timezone": "America/New_York",
  "rows_per_page": 50
}
```

**PATCH — Response 200:** Same shape as GET response with merged values.

**Error responses:** 401 (unauthenticated), 422 (validation error on field value).

---

### 2.2 D40 — System Management (Admin-only)

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/settings/market-data` | Admin | Market data settings (existing; extended with 3 keys) |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/settings/market-data` | Admin | Update market data settings (existing) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs` | Admin | List jobs + last run (existing) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs/{job_name}/history` | Admin | Run history (existing) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs/{job_name}/trigger` | Admin | Manual trigger (existing) |
| POST | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs/{job_name}/toggle` | Admin | Enable/disable job (existing) |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/feature-flags` | Admin | List all feature flags |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/feature-flags/{key}` | Admin | Update single flag |

**GET /api/v1/admin/feature-flags — Response 200**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "key": "maintenance_mode",
      "value_bool": false,
      "value_text": null,
      "description": "Put system into read-only maintenance mode",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-19T12:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

**PATCH /api/v1/admin/feature-flags/{key} — Request Body**

```json
{
  "value_bool": true
}
```

Or for text-valued flags (future):

```json
{
  "value_text": "value"
}
```

**PATCH — Response 200:** Updated flag object.

**Error responses:** 403 (non-admin), 404 (key not found).

---

### 2.3 D41 — User Management (Admin-only)

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/users` | Admin | Paginated user list with filters |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/status` | Admin | Set is_active |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role` | Admin | Set role (USER or ADMIN only) |

**GET /api/v1/admin/users — Query Params**

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | int | 1 | 1-based page |
| rows_per_page | int | 25 | 10/25/50/100 (from D39 preference or default 25) |
| search | string | — | Search email, first_name, last_name, display_name |
| role | string | — | USER \| ADMIN \| SUPERADMIN |
| is_active | bool | — | true \| false |

**GET — Response 200**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "email": "user@example.com",
      "display_name": "John Doe",
      "role": "USER",
      "is_active": true,
      "phone_number": "+1234567890",
      "last_login_at": "2026-03-18T10:00:00Z",
      "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "total": 42,
  "page": 1,
  "rows_per_page": 25,
  "pages": 2
}
```

**display_name:** `first_name + " " + last_name`; if both null, fallback to `username`.

**PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/status — Request Body**

```json
{
  "is_active": false
}
```

**PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role — Request Body**

```json
{
  "role": "ADMIN"
}
```

Allowed values: `USER`, `ADMIN`. `SUPERADMIN` transitions blocked (403).

**Self-protection (API):** 403 if target user id = current user id for status or role change.

---

## §3 DB Contract

### 3.1 Tables Accessed

| Table | Schema | Access | Notes |
|-------|--------|--------|-------|
| users | user_data | READ, WRITE | timezone, language, settings (JSONB — new column) |
| trading_accounts | user_data | READ | For default_trading_account SELECT options |
| user_api_keys | user_data | READ | Count for api_key_count |
| system_settings | market_data | READ, WRITE | Market data + 3 new keys |
| feature_flags | admin_data | READ, WRITE | New table |
| job_run_log | admin_data | READ | Background job history |

### 3.2 Schema Changes (WP001 scope)

**Migration 1 — user_data.users**

```sql
ALTER TABLE user_data.users
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS settings JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb;
```

**Migration 2 — admin_data.feature_flags**

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS admin_data.feature_flags (
    key VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY,
    value_bool BOOLEAN,
    value_text VARCHAR(500),
    description TEXT,
    updated_by UUID REFERENCES user_data.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

**Seed — admin_data.feature_flags (3 rows)**

```sql
INSERT INTO admin_data.feature_flags (key, value_bool, description) VALUES
  ('maintenance_mode', false, 'Put system into read-only maintenance mode'),
  ('smtp_enabled', false, 'Enable outbound email notifications'),
  ('new_user_registration_enabled', true, 'Allow new user self-registration')
ON CONFLICT (key) DO NOTHING;
```

**Seed — market_data.system_settings (3 new keys)**

```sql
INSERT INTO market_data.system_settings (key, value, value_type, description) VALUES
  ('trading_hours_start', '09:30', 'string', 'Market trading hours start (HH:MM local)'),
  ('trading_hours_end', '16:00', 'string', 'Market trading hours end (HH:MM local)'),
  ('trading_timezone', 'America/New_York', 'string', 'Timezone for trading hours evaluation')
ON CONFLICT (key) DO NOTHING;
```

### 3.3 Query Patterns

| Operation | Table | Pattern |
|-----------|-------|---------|
| GET preferences | user_data.users | SELECT id, timezone, language, settings WHERE id = :current_user_id |
| PATCH preferences | user_data.users | UPDATE users SET timezone=?, language=?, settings = settings \|\| ?::jsonb WHERE id = ? |
| GET users list | user_data.users | SELECT with filters, pagination, ORDER BY created_at DESC |
| PATCH user status | user_data.users | UPDATE users SET is_active=? WHERE id=? AND id != :current_user_id |
| PATCH user role | user_data.users | UPDATE users SET role=? WHERE id=? AND id != :current_user_id AND role != 'SUPERADMIN' |

---

## §4 UI Structural Contract

### 4.1 D39 — Preferences Page

**Route:** `/preferences` (or `/preferences.html` per routes.json)

**Component hierarchy:**

```
page-wrapper
  page-container
    main
      tt-container
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-a"][data-testid="preferences-display-locale"]
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-b"][data-testid="preferences-trading-defaults"]
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-c"][data-testid="preferences-notifications"]
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-d"][data-testid="preferences-dashboard-layout"]
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-e"][data-testid="preferences-api"]
        tt-section[data-section="preferences-group-f"][data-testid="preferences-accessibility"]
```

**DOM anchors (data-testid):**

| Anchor | Location | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| preferences-page | tt-container | Page root |
| preferences-group-a | tt-section | Display & Locale |
| preferences-group-b | tt-section | Trading Defaults |
| preferences-group-c | tt-section | Notification Settings |
| preferences-group-d | tt-section | Dashboard Layout |
| preferences-group-e | tt-section | API (read-only) |
| preferences-group-f | tt-section | Accessibility |
| preferences-save-btn-{group} | button in section header | Per-group Save |
| preferences-language | input/select | language (disabled, "עתידי" label) |
| preferences-rows-per-page | select | rows_per_page (10/25/50/100) |

**State shape:** Read from `window.TT.preferences` (cached on app init). PATCH success updates cache. No per-page GET.

---

### 4.2 D40 — System Management Page

**Route:** `/system_management` (or `/system_management.html`)

**Component hierarchy (7 sections):**

```
page-wrapper
  page-container
    main
      tt-container
        tt-section[data-section="market-data-settings"][data-testid="d40-market-data"]
        tt-section[data-section="background-jobs"][data-testid="d40-background-jobs"]
        tt-section[data-section="feature-flags"][data-testid="d40-feature-flags"]
        tt-section[data-section="alert-conditions"][data-testid="d40-alert-conditions"]
        tt-section[data-section="system-health"][data-testid="d40-system-health"]
        tt-section[data-section="recent-activity"][data-testid="d40-recent-activity"]
        tt-section[data-section="active-config"][data-testid="d40-active-config"]
```

**DOM anchors:**

| Anchor | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| d40-market-data | Market Data Settings |
| d40-background-jobs | Sync Jobs list, trigger, toggle |
| d40-feature-flags | Feature flags toggles |
| d40-job-trigger-{job_name} | Manual trigger button |
| d40-job-toggle-{job_name} | Enable/disable button |
| d40-feature-flag-{key} | Toggle per flag |

---

### 4.3 D41 — User Management Page

**Route:** `/user_management` (or `/user_management.html`)

**Component hierarchy:**

```
page-wrapper
  page-container
    main
      tt-container
        tt-section[data-section="users-list"][data-testid="d41-users-list"]
```

**DOM anchors:**

| Anchor | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| d41-users-table | User list table |
| d41-users-pagination | Pagination controls |
| d41-users-search | Search input |
| d41-users-filter-role | Role filter select |
| d41-users-filter-status | is_active filter |
| d41-user-row-{id} | Table row |
| d41-user-action-promote | Promote to ADMIN (USER row) |
| d41-user-action-demote | Demote to USER (ADMIN row) |
| d41-user-action-deactivate | Deactivate button |
| d41-superadmin-row | SUPERADMIN row (no action buttons) |

**Pagination:** `rows_per_page` from D39 `window.TT.preferences.rows_per_page`; default 25.

---

## §5 MCP Test Scenarios

### 5.1 D39 — Preferences

| ID | Precondition | Action | Expected Assertion |
|----|--------------|--------|--------------------|
| MCP-D39-01 | Authenticated user, preferences migrated | GET /api/v1/me/preferences | 200; body has 23 keys; language, timezone, settings-sourced fields present |
| MCP-D39-02 | Authenticated user | PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences {"timezone":"Europe/London"} | 200; GET returns timezone=Europe/London |
| MCP-D39-03 | Authenticated user | PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences {"rows_per_page":50} | 200; settings.rows_per_page = 50 |
| MCP-D39-04 | No token | GET /api/v1/me/preferences | 401 |
| MCP-D39-05 | Valid token | Preferences page load | No GET /api/v1/me/preferences (cache only); language field disabled with "עתידי" |

### 5.2 D40 — System Management

| ID | Precondition | Action | Expected Assertion |
|----|--------------|--------|--------------------|
| MCP-D40-01 | Admin user | GET /api/v1/admin/feature-flags | 200; items contain maintenance_mode, smtp_enabled, new_user_registration_enabled |
| MCP-D40-02 | Admin user | PATCH /api/v1/admin/feature-flags/maintenance_mode {"value_bool":true} | 200; value_bool=true |
| MCP-D40-03 | Admin user | POST /api/v1/admin/background-jobs/{job_name}/trigger | 200; triggered=true |
| MCP-D40-04 | Non-admin user | GET /api/v1/admin/feature-flags | 403 |
| MCP-D40-05 | Admin user | System Management page | All 7 sections present; market data includes trading_hours_start/end, trading_timezone |

### 5.3 D41 — User Management

| ID | Precondition | Action | Expected Assertion |
|----|--------------|--------|--------------------|
| MCP-D41-01 | Admin user | GET /api/v1/admin/users?page=1&rows_per_page=25 | 200; items array; total, page, pages present |
| MCP-D41-02 | Admin user | GET /api/v1/admin/users?search=john&role=USER | 200; filtered results |
| MCP-D41-03 | Admin user | PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/status {"is_active":false} | 200; target user is_active=false |
| MCP-D41-04 | Admin user, target=current user | PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{self_id}/status {"is_active":false} | 403 |
| MCP-D41-05 | Admin user | PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role {"role":"ADMIN"} | 200; target role=ADMIN |
| MCP-D41-06 | Admin user, target=SUPERADMIN | PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role {"role":"USER"} | 403 |
| MCP-D41-07 | Non-admin user | GET /api/v1/admin/users | 403 |

---

## §6 Acceptance Criteria

Each criterion is tagged AUTO_TESTABLE or HUMAN_ONLY per GATE_0_1_2_SPEC_LIFECYCLE_CONTRACT.

### D39 — User Preferences

| # | Criterion | Tag |
|---|-----------|-----|
| AC-D39-01 | GET /api/v1/me/preferences returns 200 with all 23 fields | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-02 | PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences persists timezone/language to direct columns | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-03 | PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences merges other fields into settings JSONB | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-04 | Frontend reads preferences from window.TT.preferences (no per-page GET) | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-05 | PATCH success invalidates and repopulates cache | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-06 | D39 page has 6 collapsible containers (tt-section) | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-07 | Each container has its own Save button | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D39-08 | language field is disabled with "עתידי" label visible | HUMAN_ONLY |
| AC-D39-09 | default_trading_account shows instructional note when user has no accounts | HUMAN_ONLY |

### D40 — System Management

| # | Criterion | Tag |
|---|-----------|-----|
| AC-D40-01 | Market Data Settings includes trading_hours_start, trading_hours_end, trading_timezone | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-02 | Feature Flags section displays 3 initial flags; PATCH updates value_bool | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-03 | Background Tasks: manual trigger works (POST trigger returns 200) | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-04 | Background Tasks: enable/disable toggle works | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-05 | All 7 sections present on D40 page | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-06 | D40 is admin-only (403 for non-admin) | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D40-07 | Confirm modal appears before manual job trigger | HUMAN_ONLY |

### D41 — User Management

| # | Criterion | Tag |
|---|-----------|-----|
| AC-D41-01 | GET /api/v1/admin/users returns paginated list with search, role, is_active filters | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D41-02 | rows_per_page from query param (default 25); respects 10/25/50/100 | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D41-03 | PATCH status and PATCH role work for eligible targets | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D41-04 | Self-status and self-role change return 403 | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D41-05 | SUPERADMIN role transition returns 403 | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-D41-06 | SUPERADMIN row in table has no action buttons | HUMAN_ONLY |
| AC-D41-07 | display_name shows first_name + last_name or username fallback | AUTO_TESTABLE |

### Setup Tasks (S003-P003 preamble)

| # | Criterion | Tag |
|---|-----------|-----|
| AC-SETUP-01 | python-jose → PyJWT migration complete (SETUP-01) | AUTO_TESTABLE |
| AC-SETUP-02 | mypy KB-006: clean run (SETUP-02) | AUTO_TESTABLE |

# Team 10 | S003-P003-WP001 — G3 Work Plan (System Settings D39+D40+D41)

**Team 00 G3_PLAN Directive:** `_COMMUNICATION/team_00/TEAM_00_TO_TEAM_10_S003_P003_WP001_G3PLAN_DIRECTIVE_v1.0.0.md`

This directive contains **BF-SPEC-01** (BLOCKING): PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences must whitelist writable fields; `api_key_count` and `api_rate_limit` are read-only and MUST be excluded. The work plan reflects **IMPL-PATCH-GUARD** in Team 20 mandates.

## 1. Approved Spec (Locked)

**Source:** `_COMMUNICATION/team_170/TEAM_170_S003_P003_WP001_LLD400_v1.0.0.md`

S003-P003-WP001: System Settings. D39 — User Preferences (GET/PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences, 23 fields); D40 — System Management (market-data, background-jobs, feature-flags); D41 — User Management (admin users list, status, role). HTTP API + React UI. DB: users.settings JSONB, admin_data.feature_flags, market_data.system_settings.

---

## 2. Files to Create/Modify per Team

**Domain:** TIKTRACK — Team 20 (backend), Team 30 (frontend), Team 50 (QA).

### 2.1 Canonical Paths per Team

| Team | Deliverable | Canonical Path |
|------|-------------|----------------|
| Team 20 | Contract verify | `_COMMUNICATION/team_20/TEAM_20_S003_P003_WP001_CONTRACT_VERIFY_v1.0.0.md` |
| Team 20 | Implementation | `api/routers/`, `api/services/`, `api/models/` |
| Team 30 | Implementation | `ui/src/pages/`, `ui/src/components/`, `ui/src/api/` |
| Team 50 | QA report | `_COMMUNICATION/team_50/TEAM_50_S003_P003_WP001_QA_REPORT_v1.0.0.md` |

### 2.2 Team 20 — Contract Verify (Pre-Implementation)

| Action | File | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| **READ** | `_COMMUNICATION/team_00/TEAM_00_TO_TEAM_10_S003_P003_WP001_G3PLAN_DIRECTIVE_v1.0.0.md` | BF-SPEC-01 + IMPL-PATCH-GUARD |
| **READ** | `_COMMUNICATION/team_170/TEAM_170_S003_P003_WP001_LLD400_v1.0.0.md` | LLD400 spec |
| **VERIFY** | `api/` | Existing routers, models; identify gaps for D39/D40/D41 |
| **OUTPUT** | `_COMMUNICATION/team_20/TEAM_20_S003_P003_WP001_CONTRACT_VERIFY_v1.0.0.md` | Confirmed API contract, schema gaps |

### 2.3 Team 20 — Implementation

| Action | File | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| **CREATE** | `api/routers/preferences.py` or extend `api/routers/me.py` | D39: GET/PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences |
| **MODIFY** | `api/` (routers, services, models) | **IMPL-PATCH-GUARD:** PREFERENCES_WRITABLE_FIELDS whitelist; exclude api_key_count, api_rate_limit; merge only allowed fields |
| **CREATE/MODIFY** | `api/routers/admin/feature_flags.py` | D40: GET/PATCH /api/v1/admin/feature-flags |
| **CREATE/MODIFY** | `api/routers/admin/users.py` | D41: GET /api/v1/admin/users, PATCH status/role |
| **CREATE** | DB migrations | §3.2: users.settings JSONB; admin_data.feature_flags; system_settings keys |
| **MODIFY** | `api/models/` | User preferences model; feature_flags model |

**IMPL-PATCH-GUARD (BF-SPEC-01 — mandatory):** PATCH /api/v1/me/preferences body processing must whitelist allowed JSONB-persisted fields. Fields `api_key_count` and `api_rate_limit` must be excluded from persistence. Build `PREFERENCES_WRITABLE_FIELDS` constant/set; merge only fields in that set. Log warning (debug level) if client sends excluded fields.

### 2.4 Team 30 — Implementation

| Action | File | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| **CREATE** | `ui/src/pages/PreferencesPage.jsx` (or equivalent) | D39: 6 tt-section groups per §4.1 |
| **CREATE** | `ui/src/pages/SystemManagementPage.jsx` | D40: 7 sections (market-data, background-jobs, feature-flags, etc.) |
| **CREATE** | `ui/src/pages/UserManagementPage.jsx` | D41: users list, search, filters, pagination |
| **MODIFY** | `ui/src/api/` | preferences API client; admin feature-flags, users API |
| **MODIFY** | Routes | /preferences, /system_management, /user_management |

### 2.5 Team 50 — QA

## 3. Execution Order with Dependencies

### 3.1 Execution Order

```
Step 1: Team 20 — Contract verify (BLOCKING for implementation)
        ↓
Step 2: Team 20 — Backend (D39, D40, D41) — IMPL-PATCH-GUARD included
        ↓
Step 3: Team 30 — Frontend (D39, D40, D41)
        ↓
Step 4: Team 50 — QA/FAV
        ↓
Step 5: GATE_4 submission to Team 90
```

**Dependency rules:**
- Team 20 implementation starts only after contract verify note exists.
- Team 30 can start D39 UI after D39 API exists; D40/D41 follow backend availability.
- Team 50 QA runs only after Team 20 + Team 30 completion.

## 4. API / Contract Summary

### 4.1 D39 — User Preferences

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/v1/me/preferences` | Bearer JWT | Return 23 preference fields; api_key_count, api_rate_limit computed (read-only) |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/me/preferences` | Bearer JWT | Whitelist merge; exclude api_key_count, api_rate_limit (IMPL-PATCH-GUARD) |

**Writable fields:** All 23 except `api_key_count`, `api_rate_limit`. Direct columns: `timezone`, `language`. JSONB: remainder.

### 4.2 D40 — System Management (Admin)

| Method | Path | Auth |
|--------|------|------|
| GET/PATCH | `/api/v1/settings/market-data` | Admin |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs` | Admin |
| GET/POST | `/api/v1/admin/background-jobs/{job_name}/history`, trigger, toggle | Admin |
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/feature-flags` | Admin |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/feature-flags/{key}` | Admin |

### 4.3 D41 — User Management (Admin)

| Method | Path | Auth |
|--------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/v1/admin/users` | Admin |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/status` | Admin |
| PATCH | `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role` | Admin |

### 4.4 DB Schema (from LLD400 §3.2)

| Table | Change |
|-------|--------|
| user_data.users | ADD COLUMN settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}' |
| admin_data.feature_flags | CREATE TABLE (key, value_bool, value_text, description, updated_by, updated_at) |
| market_data.system_settings | 3 new keys: trading_hours_start, trading_hours_end, trading_timezone |

## 5. Test Scenarios — Run Commands and Binary PASS/FAIL

### 5.1 D39 — Preferences

| test_id | Run Command / Steps | PASS | FAIL |
|---------|---------------------|------|------|
| QA-D39-01 | `curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:8082/api/v1/me/preferences` | 200; 23 keys; api_key_count, api_rate_limit present | Non-200 or missing keys |
| QA-D39-02 | PATCH `{"timezone":"Europe/London"}` | 200; GET returns timezone=Europe/London | Wrong |
| QA-D39-03 | PATCH `{"api_key_count":99}` | No persistence of api_key_count; 422 or silent strip | api_key_count persisted |
| QA-D39-04 | GET without token | 401 | 200 |

### 5.2 D40 — Feature Flags

| test_id | Run Command / Steps | PASS | FAIL |
|---------|---------------------|------|------|
| QA-D40-01 | Admin: GET /api/v1/admin/feature-flags | 200; items include maintenance_mode | Non-200 |
| QA-D40-02 | Admin: PATCH feature-flags/maintenance_mode {"value_bool":true} | 200 | Non-200 |
| QA-D40-03 | Non-admin: GET /api/v1/admin/feature-flags | 403 | 200 |

### 5.3 D41 — User Management

| test_id | Run Command / Steps | PASS | FAIL |
|---------|---------------------|------|------|
| QA-D41-01 | Admin: GET /api/v1/admin/users?page=1 | 200; items, total, page present | Non-200 |
| QA-D41-02 | Admin: PATCH status on other user | 200 | Non-200 |
| QA-D41-03 | Admin: PATCH status on self | 403 | 200 |

### 5.4 pytest Regression

```bash
cd api && python -m pytest tests/ -v -k "preferences or feature_flags or admin_users"
```
**PASS:** exit 0. **FAIL:** exit ≠ 0.

### 6.4 Field Contract — D39 Preferences

| Field | Type | Empty State | Error |
|-------|------|-------------|-------|
| default_trading_account | string \| null | null when no accounts; instructional note | — |
| language | string | Disabled with "עתידי" | — |
| api_key_count, api_rate_limit | number | 0, 1000 | Read-only; never from PATCH |

### 6.5 Error-State Contract

| Code | Condition |
|------|-----------|
| 401 | No/invalid Bearer token |
| 403 | Non-admin on D40/D41; self-status/self-role; SUPERADMIN role change |
| 422 | Invalid PATCH body (validation); excluded fields (optional explicit reject) |
